title: Notice of Intent to Sole Source - Key Solutions, Inc. - eProtocol and Lab Animal Resource System (LARS) Software
name: Key Solutions, Inc. - eProtocol and Lab Animal
statement_of_work: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), National Center for Immunization and Respiratory Diseases (NCIRD), Office of Director (OD), Office of Laboratory Systems and Response (OLSR), intends to award a sole source firm fixed price purchase order to Key Solutions, Inc., 2803 Lakeview Ct, Fremont, CA, 94538 for the purchase of the eProtocol software license for the Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) and for the purchase of Lab Animal Resource System (LARS) software license. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) utilizes the Key Solutions’ eProtocol modules to manage their animal care program. It currently supports the entire agency in the area of animal procurement and ordering; animal record keeping; data collection; reporting tools; and billing information.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the Key Solutions, Inc. - eProtocol and Lab Animal solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
dept: HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF.CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION.CDC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION SERVICES
description: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), National Center for Immunization and Respiratory Diseases (NCIRD), Office of Director (OD), Office of Laboratory Systems and Response (OLSR), intends to award a sole source firm fixed price purchase order to Key Solutions, Inc., 2803 Lakeview Ct, Fremont, CA, 94538 for the purchase of the eProtocol software license for the Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) and for the purchase of Lab Animal Resource System (LARS) software license. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) utilizes the Key Solutions’ eProtocol modules to manage their animal care program. It currently supports the entire agency in the area of animal procurement and ordering; animal record keeping; data collection; reporting tools; and billing information. The Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) protocol compliance module ensures consistent protocol review, maintains full traceability, simplifies role -based access, and strengthens compliance oversight. The Lab Animal Resource System (LARS) module streamlines end - to-end activities, from animal requisition to daily management.
